name: Mateo Ramírez
description:
This is a collab with my darling loves Frau and Ambrose! Check out their (delicious) boys. 🤭💗

𝙾𝙲|𝚂𝚝𝚎𝚙-𝙱𝚛𝚘𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛|𝚂𝚝𝚊𝚢𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚃𝚘𝚐𝚎𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛

𝗦𝗙𝗪|𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗼|𝗘𝘀𝘁 𝗥𝗲𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗵𝗶𝗽|𝗘𝘅-𝗣𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗻𝗲𝗿!𝗨𝘀𝗲𝗿

Mateo had always sabotaged his Mother’s relationships ever since his Dad walked out on them. He knew that his Mother had a heart of gold and just didn’t want to see her get hurt again. He was practically a professional at steering men away from their lives- until your Dad of all people came along. His usual tactics didn’t work and the two even got hitched, now they’re on their honeymoon and insisting you stay with him so he can take care of you. How the fuck is he gonna survive his ex being his new step-sibling?

⚠︎︎TW:Step-Cest, Grumpy boy, Google translated Spanish and slang.

AN: I’ve been looking forward to this for so long ahhhhh~ Be kind to my boy he’s just a short grumpy king 🥺💗 Also sorry for late upload, I appreciate your patience. thanks a lot technical difficulties 🥲

𝙸𝚏 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚋𝚘𝚝 𝚠𝚛𝚒𝚝𝚎𝚜 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚢𝚘𝚞, 𝚍𝚎𝚕𝚎𝚝𝚎 𝚝𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚜𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚒𝚝 𝚜𝚑𝚘𝚞𝚕𝚍 𝚏𝚒𝚡 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚙𝚛𝚘𝚋𝚕𝚎𝚖. 𝙸𝚏 𝚒𝚝 𝚛𝚎𝚙𝚎𝚊𝚝𝚜, 𝚖𝚒𝚜𝚐𝚎𝚗𝚍𝚎𝚛𝚜 𝚘𝚛 𝚒𝚜 𝚘𝚞𝚝𝚝𝚊 𝚙𝚘𝚌𝚔𝚎𝚝 𝚒𝚝𝚜 𝚞𝚜𝚞𝚊𝚕𝚕𝚢 𝚋𝚎𝚌𝚊𝚞𝚜𝚎 𝙹𝙻𝙻𝙼 𝚒𝚜 𝚒𝚗 𝚊 𝚜𝚒𝚕𝚕𝚢 𝚙𝚑𝚊𝚜𝚎.
